response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, extensive open-source contributions, and a long track record in full-stack development and architecture, but lacks proven leadership experience in managing teams or projects at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level — critical for client advisory and operational leadership in a German-market consulting firm.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with strong alignment to digital sovereignty and Linux/Unix ecosystems
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse technologies including DLang, Node.js, TypeScript, and Kubernetes
Demonstrated ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor others through workshops, talks, and community projects
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting the mandatory C1 requirement
No clear evidence of formal team leadership, project management, or client advisory responsibilities at executive level
Lacks explicit mention of UML, requirements management, or IT security/compliance experience despite being required
